scenes.Scene: Drone establishment gliding over a quiet main street at sunrise, settling on a single lit bakery window.
Tracking shot following a warm loaf from the oven to a paper bag as a name is written on it.
Rack focus from a phone showing a follower graph to a regular customer laughing at the counter.
Slow push-in on a hand extending the loaf toward the lens, warm light, looping back to the opening street.
